# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — root-to-custom-context

AJP proxy at /, app on /app context. The proxy adds the /app prefix when forwarding to the backend's custom context. PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade} websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
RewriteRule ^/(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/app/$1" [P,L]

ProxyPass         "/"      ajp://vaadin:8009/app/
ProxyPassReverse  "/"      "/app/"
ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/app" "/"

```
